summary: Dashboard error state renders correctly with proper mobile navigation and state handling. Brand palette issues present but non-blocking since core functionality and state contract are preserved.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/white UI surfaces instead of the required diner palette - should use cream #fff8ea for cards and appropriate diner colors for primary surfaces
Signed-in app chrome uses generic styling instead of maintaining visual separation from public marketing while preserving brand coherence

actions: Apply diner palette to dashboard cards and surfaces while maintaining authenticated app chrome distinction
Verify mobile drawer navigation continues to work at 390px viewport
Ensure error state gracefully handles unavailable data sections as specified
